question: Choose the correct description for how we can perform an EBS volume data backup. ​ Create a replica of EBS ​ Set up automatic backup of EBS volumes. ​ Set up DML for EBS and schedule backups. ​
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. You can ensure a backup of your EBS volume by taking a snapshot of your EBS volume. EBS snapshots are incremental backups. That is, the first snapshot takes a backup of all the data, but subsequent snapshots only store blocks on the device that have changed since the last snapshot. This minimizes the time required to take a snapshot and saves storage costs by not replicating data. Options 1 and 2 are incorrect. You must use the snapshot feature to make a backup of your EBS volume. Replicas and automatic backups are not available on EBS. Option 3 is incorrect. You can schedule snapshot acquisition by using DML, but it is not an essential backup method, only an optional one.

question: I want to utilize high-speed cache processing for RDS. Which service should I use?
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. By using Amazon ElastiCache, you can build a linkage that keeps RDS queries in the cache for high-speed access. Amazon ElastiCache is an in-memory datastore type high-speed cache database service that uses open source Redis and Memcached. You can use this DB to retrieve data from a high-throughput, low-latency in-memory data store to build applications that handle large amounts of data or improve the performance of existing applications. Option 1 is incorrect. Redshift is a data warehouse that runs on AWS. Redshift cannot work with RDS to perform high-speed processing. Option 3 is incorrect. S3 Transfer Acceleration is a function that enables high-speed transfer to S3 data. It has nothing to do with RDS cache usage. Option 4 is incorrect. Aurora is a relational database compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL. You can achieve faster performance than regular RDS, but ElastiCache is better suited for high-speed data processing linked with RDS.

question: Select the service that should be used to perform a linkage function, ensuring communication between components. ​ SES ​ API Gateway ​ Lambda ​
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. Amazon SQS is a fully managed service that creates and manages message queues. SQS can send and receive messages between software components, and can implement task linkage and parallel processing between components. This mechanism improves overall system fault tolerance by allowing components to be separated and processed independently. All queue messages are stored redundantly across multiple Availability Zones so that they are not lost. Option 1 is incorrect. Amazon SES is an email service that enables you to implement email functions in applications, etc., and is not used for linking components. Option 2 is incorrect. Amazon API Gateway is a fully managed API management service that makes it easy to create, distribute, maintain, monitor, and protect APIs. This is also not used for coordination between components. Option 3 is incorrect. With AWS Lambda, you can run your code without provisioning or managing servers. This is not a service used to send and receive messages between components.

question: You want to prevent downtime in a region for applications under development to near zero, even in the case of a large-scale disaster. Which deployment method should you choose?
explanation: The AWS Global Infrastructure is centered around Regions and Availability Zones (AZs). Each AWS Region is a separate geographical area. Each AWS Region is further made up of multiple separate locations called Availability Zones. By using a multi-AZ configuration, it is possible to build a highly redundant and highly available system that can continue to operate even if one AZ is stopped, but it cannot be handled if a failure occurs over the entire region. .. In this scenario, it is necessary to prevent downtime in the event of a disaster, and it is necessary to configure it even for region failures. You can further increase redundancy and fault tolerance by preparing a configuration that sets up the secondary configuration on standby across multiple regions. Therefore, option 2 multi-region is the correct answer.

question: Malware delivery to your AWS resources has been confirmed. Knowing this, which AWS department should you contact?
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. AWS Trust & Safety team can assist you when AWS resources are used to engage in the following types of abusive behavior:・Spam: You are receiving unwanted emails from an AWS-owned IP address, or AWS resources are used to spam websites or forums.・Port scanning: Your logs show that one or more AWS-owned IP addresses are sending packets to multiple ports on your server, and you believe this is an attempt to discover unsecured ports.・DDoS attacks: Your logs show that one or more AWS-owned IP addresses are used to flood ports on your resources with packets, and you believe that this is an attempt to overwhelm or crash your server or the software running on your server.・Intrusion attempts: Your logs show that one or more AWS-owned IP addresses are used to attempt to log in to your resources.・Hosting objectionable or copyrighted content: You have evidence that AWS resources are used to host or distribute illegal content or distribute copyrighted content without the consent of the copyright holder.・Distributing malware: You have evidence that AWS resources are used to distribute software that was knowingly created to compromise or cause harm to computers or machines on which it is installed.

question: Please select the correct description for the data you saved in Amazon S3. ​
options: You can access the S3 object via a URL.

Auto scaling is applied to the storage area of S3.

explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. Amazon S3 allows you to access your bucket with both virtual host-style URLs and path-style URLs Option 2 is incorrect. question: It is desirable to design AWS based on the principles of a flexible and elastic cloud architecture. How do you achieve this architecture?
options: Implement a configuration that automates scaling according to demand.
Configure an architecture that links loosely coupled components.
answer: Implement a configuration that automates scaling according to demand.
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. The concept of elasticity includes the ability to automatically expand or contract resources based on changing demand. Auto Scaling is a typical service that manages this function on AWS. By configuring an architecture that incorporates Auto Scaling, you can automate the process of adding or removing Amazon EC2 instances as demand increases or decreases. Option 2 is incorrect. Loose coupling between components reduces interdependence between application components and reduces risk. This is not flexibility, but an architecture that improves performance and availability. Option 3 is incorrect. A serverless application is an application that uses Lambda functions without using server services such as EC2. This is not flexibility, but cost optimization and reliability. Option 4 is incorrect. Infrastructure coding is a response used to achieve environmental automation.

question: Select the combination of services you should use to keep track of your billing limit in a timely manner. ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. CloudWatch allows you to set a billing alarm that triggers a notification when your usage charges exceed a set threshold. question: What should I do to minimize billing for EC2 instances of applications that I haven't used for months?

question: Choose the service that allows you to define provisioning and configuration rules and monitor their deviations. ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. AWS Config continuously audits and evaluates whether your AWS resource settings meet corporate policies and compliance. question: Choose a setting to protect your S3 data. (Select two.) ​ Delete the security key. ​
options: Implement authority management according to IAM policy.
explanation: If you want to protect the data used in S3, either encrypt the data when transferring it or encrypt the stored data.  You can protect the data in transit by using SSL or client-side encryption to encrypt the data in transit. Option 5 is incorrect. HTTPS (TLS) can be used to prevent potential attackers from using man-in-the-middle attacks or similar attacks done through eavesdropping or manipulating network traffic. Therefore, option 3 is the correct answer.

question: Choose the correct description of how we can use AWS global infrastructure. ​

question: Select a service that verifies that your application on AWS has the proper security settings. ​

question: You want to migrate 155TB of data in your on-premises environment to AWS. Which device combination will provide the most cost-effective migration?

question: Select which CloudWatch settings are used to get detailed information from inside your EC2 instance. (Select two.) ​ Use CloudWatch events to get detailed information about EC2 instances. ​

explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. question: Choose the method of purchase with the highest discount rate for your EC2 instances. ​

As long as your bid is above the current spot price, you can use that instance. This can be expected to have a large cost reduction effect.

question: Which estimation tools are currently available on AWS?

question: Select one of the following that will reduce costs. ​ If you set an Elastic IP address, you will be charged, so you can reduce the cost by detaching it. ​

question: You are building a web application that will be used globally. Choose a deployment method to load the server for global users. ​ Deploy to two or more VPCs in two AZs ​ Deploy to multiple AZs in one region ​
options: Deploy to multiple AZs in multiple regions

To increase the redundancy of web applications that will be deployed globally, you need to use multiple AWS regions. For maximum redundancy, deploy your application to multiple AZs in multiple AWS Regions. This configuration improves application fault tolerance. Having an infrastructure configuration for each region provides optimal application processing even for geographically distant users. In addition, it can continue to operate in the event of a failure in an AZ within a particular region.

question: Choose the correct description of ELB's sticky session feature ​ It is a function that distributes the load to EC2 instances deployed in multiple AZs. ​ It is a function to stop sending a new request to the backend instance when the instance is unregistered or an error occurs. ​

question: Select AWS's Availability Zone connection method when connecting within the same region. ​
explanation: Each AWS Region contains several different locations or Availability Zones. Each Availability Zone is independent of the other Availability Zones and is immune to other AZ failures. Availability zones consist of one or more data centers. AZ within a region have a low latency link network connection to other Availability Zones within the same region. This allows data to be replicated synchronously between data centers, allowing failover to be automated. Therefore, a low latency link connection allows you to synchronize your data as much as possible. Option 1 is the correct answer.

question: Choose the action you need to manage as a user, as shown in the AWS shared responsibility model. ​ Patch management ​
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. The setting of routing on the network such as VPC is within the control range on the customer side. ■Inherited Controls Controls which a customer fully inherits from AWS. Physical and Environmental controls ■Shared Controls Controls which apply to both the infrastructure layer and customer layers, but in completely separate contexts or perspectives. In a shared control, AWS provides the requirements for the infrastructure and the customer must provide their own control implementation within their use of AWS services. Examples include: -Patch Management – AWS is responsible for patching and fixing flaws within the infrastructure, but customers are responsible for patching their guest OS and applications. -Configuration Management – AWS maintains the configuration of its infrastructure devices, but a customer is responsible for configuring their own guest operating systems, databases, and applications. -Awareness & Training - AWS trains AWS employees, but a customer must train their own employees. Therefore, options 1, 3 and 4 are shared controls and are incorrect. ■Customer Specific Controls which are solely the responsibility of the customer based on the application they are deploying within AWS services.

question: I want to see if I've achieved cost optimization in using the AWS cloud, but I haven't done any detailed research. Which service should I use to investigate?
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. CloudWatch Alarm is a feature that allows you to set notifications for events. Option 3 is incorrect. AWS Config is a service that allows you to evaluate, audit, and review AWS resource settings. Config continuously monitors and records your AWS resource settings and can automatically evaluate the recorded settings for your desired settings. AWS Config does not have the ability to evaluate AWS cloud cost optimization. Option 4 is incorrect. AWS Billing and Cost Management is a service used to pay AWS invoices, monitor usage, and analyze and manage costs.

question: What are the benefits of using an EC2 instance instead of an on-premises server?
options: Data backup and protection can be fully automated.
AWS performs patch management for the software.

explanation: By using EC2 instances, you can easily build fault-tolerant applications that required complicated settings on your on-premises server. For example, you can improve fault tolerance by installing an ELB to distribute traffic across multiple instances and multiple Availability Zones so that only healthy EC2 instances can receive traffic. Therefore, option 1 is the correct answer. Option 2 is incorrect. Data backup and protection are not fully automatic and require users to perform data encryption and manual snapshots. Option 3 is incorrect. Users are required to manage patches for the software used in EC2 instances. Option 4 is incorrect. Improving remote access to the cloud depends on the external environment and is not a feature of EC2 instances.

question: Choose a service that provides a set of servers that you can use to build a small website. ​

question: Choose a service that provides a hybrid configuration that extends on-premises storage to S3 while making on-premises storage primary. ​ AWS Storage Gateway cached volume gateway ​

question: Which service detects unauthorized access in your VPC flow log?

question: Your company needs to manage the accounts of 100 AWS users. Which setting should you make?

question: You are considering a database suitable for managing and utilizing a large number of JSON files. Choose the best AWS service. ​ RDS ​

question: Choose a support service that provides quick response to invoice and account questions. ​ Amazon Trusted Advisor ​
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. question: Choose the correct description of the reliability principle, one of the basic principles of the Well Architected Framework. ​ Shared model of security measures ​ Cost optimization ​
explanation: Reliability is the principle of ensuring that the system can be used continuously without problems. Reliability is also "disability endurance" and is an indicator of the frequency and intervals at which systems and services become unavailable. Reliability includes the ability of the system to recover from infrastructure or service interruptions, dynamically acquire computing resources on demand, and mitigate interruptions such as misconfigurations and temporary network problems. To increase reliability, redundant system configurations must enable early recovery from failures. Therefore, option 3 is the correct answer.

question: You want to use EC2 instances for a long period of 3 years or more, but you need to be able to exchange instance sizes along the way. Choose the cheapest instance type that meets this requirement. ​ Reserved Instance (Convertible ) ​ Reserved Instance (Scheduled) ​

There is no limit to the number of exchanges that can be performed as long as the exchanged convertible reserved instance has a value equal to or greater than the exchanged convertible reserved instance. Since the contents that can be changed in the standard are limited, the discount rate is higher due to the lower flexibility. Therefore, option 3 is the cost-optimal instance. Option 1 is incorrect. Reserved Instances (Convertibles) are more flexible, but offer lower discount rates than Standard. Option 2 is incorrect. question: Choose the feature that AWS Snowball Edge offers. ​ Mass data migration by a trailer ​

The second option is Snowball Edge Compute Optimized, which can perform advanced machine learning and full-motion video analysis in disconnected environments, and offers 52 vCPUs, block and object storage, and an optional GPU. Snowball Edge can run EC2 AMIs and deploy AWS Lambda code, allowing you to run machine learning and applications on your device for data processing and analysis locally. Therefore, option 3 is the correct answer. Option 1 is incorrect. Mass data migration with trailers is provided by Snowmobile. Snowball Edge Storage Optimized has 100TB of storage, but the available data area is up to 80TB. Snowball Edge Compute Optimized can store 42TB of data. Both cannot store 100TB of data. Option 4 is incorrect. Lambda @ Edge is a function that works with Cloudfront running at the edge location.

question: In the AWS CLI initial settings, select one of the following setting items that is not required. ​ Secret access key ​ Access key ​ Region ​

question: Select the service that should be used to perform a linkage function, ensuring communication between components. ​

This mechanism improves overall system fault tolerance by allowing components to be separated and processed independently. Option 3 is incorrect. With AWS Lambda, you can run your code without provisioning or managing servers. This is not a service used to send and receive messages between components.

question: From the following services, select a service that cannot be reserved for purchase. ​

question: Choose the correct description for CloudWatch Logs. (Select two.) ​ CloudWatch Logs stores log in S3. ​ CloudWatch Logs is a function that temporarily stores log. ​
options: CloudWatch Logs can be managed in an integrated manner with CloudTrail.
By setting conditions in CloudWatch Logs, you can send the log by email.
answer: By setting conditions in CloudWatch Logs, you can send the log by email.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. You can set up CloudWatch Logs on CloudTrail to monitor trail logs so you'll be notified when certain activities occur. Option 4 is the correct answer. You can email using SNS the contents of a specific log by creating a metric filter as a condition for the CloudWatch Logs log group. Option 1 is incorrect. CloudWatch Logs does not store log information in S3, but can be linked with CloudWatch and arbitrarily exported to S3. Option 2 is incorrect. CloudWatch Logs allows you to store log information permanently rather than temporarily.

question: Select the settings that allows an EC2 instance server to use the data in your S3 bucket. ​ Set up an IAM role for S3. ​ By default, EC2 instances can access S3 within the same region. ​
options: By default, EC2 instances can access S3 within the same AWS account.
Set up an IAM role for your EC2 instance.
answer: Set up an IAM role for your EC2 instance.
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. It is necessary to apply the IAM role that sets the IAM policy that grants access to S3 to the EC2 instance. Option 1 is incorrect. You need to configure it on your EC2 instance instead of S3. Option 2 is incorrect. Setting the IAM role is essential even in the same region. Option 3 is incorrect. Setting up an IAM role is essential even for the same account.

question: Select the most likely cause if your SSH connection to your EC2 instance fails. ​ Specified the public IP address of the EC2 instance as the SSH connection destination. ​
options: Specified the Elastic IP address of the EC2 instance as the SSH connection destination.
Specified the Private IP address of the EC2 instance as the SSH connection destination.
Specified the IPv4 IP address of the EC2 instance as the SSH connection destination.
answer: Specified the Private IP address of the EC2 instance as the SSH connection destination.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. If you specify a private IP address when specifying the IP address of the instance, access will fail because the IP address cannot be determined from the Internet. It is necessary to use a public IP address. Option 1 is incorrect. There is no problem if you specify a public IP address. Option 2 is incorrect. You can access it even with an Elastic IP address. Option 4 is incorrect. It is possible to access using an IPv4 IP address.

question: Select the features available by Trusted Adviser. ​
options: It automatically presents a configuration plan for cost optimization
It can carry out cost status monitoring
It can be used to improve security.
answer: It can be used to improve security.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. Trusted Advisor is an online resource that helps you reduce costs, improve performance, and improve security by optimizing your AWS environment. Trusted Advisor provides real-time guidance to help you provision your resources according to AWS best practices. Therefore, Trusted Adviser can improve security. Option 1 is wrong. Trusted Advisor offers suggestions for improvements, but not suggestions for configurations. Option 2 is wrong. Trusted Advisor does not perform monitoring Option 4 is wrong. Trusted Advisor cannot be used to detect unauthorized access.

question: You are building a web application that will be used globally. Choose a deployment method to load the server for global users. ​
options: Deploy to two or more VPCs in two AZs
Deploy to multiple AZs in one region
Deploy to multiple AZs in multiple regions
answer: Deploy to multiple AZs in multiple regions
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. If you have users globally, you can decentralize the processing process while ensuring low latency by installing servers located geographically close to each other. To increase the redundancy of web applications that will be deployed globally, you need to use multiple AWS regions. For maximum redundancy, deploy your application to multiple AZs in multiple AWS Regions. This configuration improves application fault tolerance. Having an infrastructure configuration for each region provides optimal application processing even for geographically distant users. In addition, it can continue to operate in the event of a failure in an AZ within a particular region.

question: Choose the correct description of ELB's sticky session feature ​
options: It is a function that distributes the load to EC2 instances deployed in multiple AZs.
It is a function to stop sending a new request to the backend instance when the instance is unregistered or an error occurs.
It is a function to send all requests from the same user to the same EC2 instance.
It is a function to check the normality / abnormality of the EC2 instance and decide which EC2 to use.
answer: It is a function to send all requests from the same user to the same EC2 instance.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. Sticky session is a function to send all requests from the same user to the same EC2 instance during the session. Option 1 is incorrect. Load distribution is a function that distributes the load to EC2 instances deployed in multiple AZs. Option 2 is incorrect. Connection Draining is a function that stops sending new requests to the backend instance when the instance is unregistered or an error occurs. Option 4 is incorrect. Health check is a function to check the normality / abnormality of EC2 instance and decide which EC2 to use.

question: Choose the correct description of IAM features. (Select two.) ​
options: It is possible to realize the integration of multiple AWS accounts.
Password-less access is possible by using multi-factor authentication
IAM allows you to customize your password policy
You can set IAM policies for IAM groups, IAM users, and IAM roles
You can suspend the permissions of the root account in IAM.
answer: You can set IAM policies for IAM groups, IAM users, and IAM roles
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. You can change your password policy from the IAM console screen. This allows you to change the password setting format that the user should use. Option 4 is the correct answer. You can grant access to AWS resources by setting IAM policies for IAM groups, IAM users, and IAM roles. Option 1 is incorrect. It is AWS Organizations that can achieve the integration of multiple AWS accounts. Option 2 is incorrect. Even if you use multi-factor authentication, you still need a password to log in. After performing password authentication when logging in, enter the MFA code to complete the login. Option 5 is incorrect. You can remove the access key for the root account and change IAM administrator privileges to the main user, but IAM cannot suspend root account privileges.

question: Choose an AWS service that you can use to integrate your on-premises MS Active Directory with IAM. ​ AWS Organizations ​
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. AWS Managed Microsoft AD makes it easy to extend your existing Active Directory to the AWS cloud. This makes it possible to integrate Active Directory used in the on-premises environment and IAM management and use it for user management. Option 1 is incorrect. AWS Organizations is a service that integrates and manages multiple AWS accounts. It does not have a function to link with Active Directory. Option 2 is incorrect. There is no such service. Option 4 is incorrect. AWS Control Tower is a service that defines security, operations, and compliance rules to help you deploy and use AWS workloads that adhere to those rules.

question: Please select the wrong description of the AWS Database Migration Service feature. ​ Supports the transition from on-premises databases to RDS. ​ Supports the transition from RDS to on-premises databases. ​ Supports the transition from RDS to EC2 database servers. ​
options: Supports the transition from RDS to Redshift.
Supports the transition from RDS to Aurora.
answer: Supports the transition from RDS to Aurora.
explanation: Option 5 is the wrong explanation, so it is the correct answer. Migrating from RDB to Aurora is easily accomplished by using RDS snapshots. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) is a service for migrating relational databases, data warehouses, and NoSQL databases. You can use this to migrate between databases in on-premises environments, AWS database services such as RDS and Redshift, and databases installed on EC2. You can also migrate from RDS to Redshift and EC2 MySQL to RDS.

question: You are considering a database suitable for managing and utilizing a large number of JSON files. Choose the best AWS service. ​ RDS ​ Aurora ​ EFS ​
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. DynamoDB can be used as a document database that stores and processes JSON format data. DynamoDB is also available as a document DB and provides native support for JSON documents. This allows DynamoDB to store semi-structured data such as Tags. With DynamoDB, you can get data from within JSON documents and perform operations at high speed. Options 1 and 2 are incorrect. RDS and Aurora are relational databases provided as managed services. Not suitable for saving JSON files. Option 3 is incorrect. EFS is file storage. It is possible to save the JSON file, but it does not meet the requirements because it is not a database.

question: Choose the correct description of the reliability principle, one of the basic principles of the Well Architected Framework. ​
explanation: Reliability is the principle of ensuring that the system can be used continuously without problems. Reliability is also "disability endurance" and is an indicator of the frequency and intervals at which systems and services become unavailable. Reliability includes the ability of the system to recover from infrastructure or service interruptions, dynamically acquire computing resources on demand, and mitigate interruptions such as misconfigurations and temporary network problems. To increase reliability, redundant system configurations must enable early recovery from failures. Therefore, option 3 is the correct answer.

question: Choose the feature that AWS Snowball Edge offers. ​
options: Mass data migration by a trailer
It can launch a Lambda edge.
explanation: AWS Snowball Edge is a data migration and edge computing device with two options. The first is Snowball Edge Storage Optimized, which provides computing with 24 vCPUs applied to both block storage and Amazon S3 compatible object storage. This is ideal for large data transfers. The second option is Snowball Edge Compute Optimized, which can perform advanced machine learning and full-motion video analysis in disconnected environments, and offers 52 vCPUs, block and object storage, and an optional GPU. Snowball Edge can run EC2 AMIs and deploy AWS Lambda code, allowing you to run machine learning and applications on your device for data processing and analysis locally. Therefore, option 3 is the correct answer. Option 1 is incorrect. Mass data migration with trailers is provided by Snowmobile. AWS Snowmobile is an exabyte-scale data transfer service that can be used to move very large amounts of data to his AWS. Option 2 is incorrect. Snowball Edge Storage Optimized has 100TB of storage, but the available data area is up to 80TB. Snowball Edge Compute Optimized can store 42TB of data. Both cannot store 100TB of data. Option 4 is incorrect. Lambda @ Edge is a function that works with Cloudfront running at the edge location. question: Choose the correct description of the NAT gateway feature. ​
options: Install the NAT gateway on the private subnet to allow access from the Internet to the private subnet
Install the NAT gateway on the private subnet to allow access to the Internet from the private subnet
Install the NAT gateway on the public subnet to allow access to the Internet from the private subnet
Install the NAT gateway on the public subnet to allow access from the Internet to the private subnet
answer: Install the NAT gateway on the public subnet to allow access to the Internet from the private subnet
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. The NAT gateway is installed in the public subnet to allow access to the Internet from the private subnet. Then, by setting the route to the NAT gateway in the route table of the private subnet, the traffic from the private subnet to the Internet is translated and then returned to the Internet through the public subnet. Options 1 and 2 are incorrect. The NAT gateway must be on the public subnet. Option 4 is incorrect. Access to the private subnet from the Internet remains blocked even with a NAT gateway.

question: Select the correct description of a region. (Please select two.) ​
options: Each region is disconnected from eachother .
All regions can be linked by connecting a dedicated line.
Connections to some regions are restricted.
Every region is available anywhere in the world.
answer: Connections to some regions are restricted.
explanation: Options 1 and 4 are correct answers. Each region is located geographically separated. Therefore, it can be used to save a backup in another region as a disaster response. Also, not all regions can connect to each other, and regions within China are limited to use within China. Therefore, option 5 is incorrect. Options 2 and 3 are incorrect. Regions are not connected by a dedicated line on the AWS side, and there are only few regions that are separated, such as regions inside China.

question: Choose the correct description of a AWS data center. ​
options: AWS is responsible for the security of all data centers.
Customers can visit the data center upon application.
One data center always constitutes one AZ.
The location of the data center is open to the public.
answer: AWS is responsible for the security of all data centers.
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. AWS is responsible for the security of all data centers and cannot be accessed or verified by users. Option 2 is incorrect. AWS employees who are not in the relevant department are not allowed access to the data center. Option 3 is incorrect. An AZ consists of one or more data centers, and a large AZ uses multiple data centers. Option 4 is incorrect. The location of the data center is private.

question: Please select a service to which AWS WAF cannot be applied. ​
explanation: Option 1 is a service that is not covered by AWS WAF and is the correct answer. AWS WAF can be deployed in conjunction with Amazon CloudFront. You can also deploy it to an Application Load Balancer placed in front of a web server or origin server running on EC2, or to an Amazon API Gateway for using the API. Therefore, Route 53 is not covered by WAF.

question: Choose the correct description of Glacier's encryption method. ​ Glacier can use encryption keys managed by S3. ​
options: Glacier uses AWS KMS to perform encryption.
Glacier performs encryption with the client's own encryption key.
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. Glacier automatically encrypts your data by default. There is no need for the user to specify the encryption key. The 256-bit Advanced Encryption Standard (AES-256), which is the strongest block cipher, is used. Option 1 is incorrect. Glacier has a different encryption mechanism from S3, and encryption is automatically executed without enabling encryption. Options 3 and 4 are incorrect. You don't have to use AWS KMS or your own encryption key to perform the encryption.

question: You have launched an EC2 instance using the free tier. Please explain the billing for this EC2 instance. ​ The free tier is always available for free. ​
options: You will be charged if you exceed the free tier expiration date or capacity.
It's free for the 12-month free period.
You will be charged if the amount of requests to your instance exceeds the free tier.
answer: You will be charged if you exceed the free tier expiration date or capacity.
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. EC2 instances that have started to be used in the free tier will also be charged beyond the free limit if the usage period or the volume capacity of the attached EBS is exceeded. Option 1 is incorrect. There is a limit to the AWS free tier. Option 3 is incorrect. Even if 12 months have not passed, you will be charged if the usage time or data amount exceeds the upper limit of the free usage limit. Option 4 is incorrect. The amount of requests to your EC2 instance is not a billing factor for your EC2 instance. You will be charged if you exceed the usage time of your EC2 instance.

question: Choose the correct description of the AMI features. ​
options: AMIs can be shared between multiple accounts.
Users cannot create their own AMI.
OS configuration information is set in the AMI, and EBS data is not duplicated.
Since AMIs are shared globally, one AMI can be deployed in multiple regions.
answer: AMIs can be shared between multiple accounts.
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. You can share your AMI with a specific AWS account without making it publicly available. All you need to share an AMI is the AWS account ID you're sharing with. The only AMIs that can be shared are unencrypted volumes and AMIs with customer-managed CMK-encrypted volumes. If you share the AMI with an encrypted volume, you must also share the CMK used to encrypt the volume. Option 2 is incorrect. Users can create their own AMI. Option 3 is incorrect. The AMI also contains EBS volume data. Option 4 is incorrect. If you want to expand the AMI to another region, you need to copy it, and the ID of another AMI will be given as the copy destination AMI.

question: The company's security policy makes it impossible to share the physical area of the cloud server with other departments. What type of EC2 instance can you use?
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. Dedicated host is an optional setting to select when physically occupying an EC2 instance. You won't share a physical server with another IAM group or user, even within the same AWS account. Option 2 is incorrect. A Dedicated instance is an Amazon EC2 instance that runs on your own hardware. This is at the host hardware level and is physically isolated from instances that belong to other AWS accounts. However, if you have the same AWS account, you may share your instance with other IAM groups. Option 3 is incorrect. Bare metal servers allow the user to control resources such as processors and storage that are on the physical server. Option 4 is incorrect. On-demand instances are a common way to use cloud instances. It shares the server with other users.

question: Select the most likely cause of an SSH connection failure to your EC2 instance. ​
options: Access to port 22 is not allowed from the client in the security group settings.
Access to port 80 is not allowed from the client in the security group settings.
Access to port 400 is not allowed from the client in the security group settings.
Access to port 110 is not allowed from the client in the security group settings.
answer: Access to port 22 is not allowed from the client in the security group settings.
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. If the security group settings do not allow inbound access from the client on port 22, you will not be able to connect using SSH. Option 2 is incorrect. Port 80 is used for the HTTP protocol. Option 3 is incorrect. Port 400 is used for the HTTPS protocol. Option 4 is incorrect. Port 110 is used for POP3.

question: Which service can protect against SQL injection?
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. With AWS WAF, you can create security rules that block common attack patterns such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting, and rules that exclude certain defined traffic patterns. WAF prevents certain traffic from reaching the application. Option 1 is incorrect. AWS Shield is a managed Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) protection service that safeguards applications running on AWS. It is necessary to use WAF for SQL injection and cross-site scripting. Option 3 is incorrect. Amazon Inspector is an evaluation tool that automatically evaluates your application for exposure, vulnerabilities, and deviations from best practices. Option 4 is incorrect. Amazon GuardDuty continuously monitors your AWS accounts and workloads to protect them from malicious and malicious activity. You need to use WAF for SQL injection and cross-site scripting.

question: Choose the wrong description for the EBS snapshot feature. (Please select two.) ​
options: It is recommended to stop EBS when taking snapshots to maintain data integrity
Snapshots are stored on other EBS.
Snapshots can be manipulated from the AWS CLI
Snapshots are not available in other regions.
answer: Snapshots are not available in other regions.
explanation: Option 3 is the wrong explanation, so it is the correct answer. The snapshot is stored in S3. Option 5 is the wrong explanation, so it is the correct answer. You can copy EBS snapshots to other regions. Option 1 is the correct explanation. It is recommended to stop when taking snapshots to maintain data integrity. Option 2 is the correct explanation. The storage period and the number of generations are unlimited. Option 4 is the correct explanation. You can create and delete EBS by operating from the AWS CLI.

question: Which services are used to protect against DDoS attacks?
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. AWS Shield is a service that protects your applications and AWS resources from managed DDoS attack. Option 1 is incorrect. Amazon Inspector is an evaluation tool that automatically evaluates your application for exposure, vulnerabilities, and deviations from best practices. Option 3 is incorrect. AWS Artifact is your go-to, central resource for compliance-related information that matters to you. It provides on-demand access to AWS’ security and compliance reports and select online agreements. Option 4 is incorrect. AWS X-Ray helps developers analyze and debug production, distributed applications, such as those built using a microservices architecture.

question: Choose the correct description of EBS features. ​
options: EBS can always be attached to only one EC2 instance.
EBS is directly accessible from the internet.
Data is backed up in multiple AZs.
EBS has data replicated to multiple servers in the AZ.
answer: EBS has data replicated to multiple servers in the AZ.
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. EBS is redundant because data is replicated to multiple servers in the AZ by default. Option 1 is incorrect. EBS cannot always be attached to only one EC2 instance. Provisioned IOPS can be shared by multiple instances. Option 2 is incorrect. EBS is not available directly from the internet. S3 is available as storage accessible from the Internet. Option 3 is incorrect. EBS data is not backed up in multiple AZs.

question: Choose the method for setting the data access authority for each object in S3. ​ Set up an S3 bucket policy. ​
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. When implementing access control for each S3 object, it is necessary to set an access control policy for the object. Option 1 is incorrect. The bucket policy is used to control access to the entire bucket. Option 3 is incorrect. The public access block is used to allow access from the Internet to the entire bucket. Option 4 is incorrect. IAM is used to grant S3 usage rights to users and other resources.

question: You have data that you want to store infrequently over the medium to long term. Also, this data is not very important. However, since data is occasionally retrieved and referenced, it will affect business if it takes time to extract the data.   Which storage type should you choose if you want the lowest cost for this situation?
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. S3 One Zone-IA saves data storage costs by storing infrequently accessed data in a single availability zone with low resilience. S3 One Zone-IA is the perfect storage type for low-cost storage of infrequently accessed, non-essential data, such as backup copies and re-creatable data summaries. Option 1 is incorrect. The standard storage class of S3 is used as the most costly and frequently used data storage in S3. Option 2 is incorrect. Amazon S3 Standard-IA is suitable for long-term storage of infrequently accessed important master data. Option 4 is incorrect. RRS is a storage type that is currently deprecated by AWS.

question: Choose the wrong description of VPC features. ​ One default VPC is automatically installed in each region. ​ You can configure a private network. ​ You can have one or more VPCs in a region. ​
options: VPC is installed in AZ by designating the specific AZ you want.
answer: VPC is installed in AZ by designating the specific AZ you want.
explanation: Option 4 is the wrong explanation, so it is correct. You don't need to specify the AZ because the VPC is installed by specifying the region. You must specify the AZ in the region when you create the A subnet. Option 1 is incorrect. When you register your AWS account, one default VPC will be automatically installed in each region. Option 2 is incorrect. You can configure a private network by configuring a private subnet within your VPC. Option 3 is incorrect. You can use one or more VPCs in each region to set up your infrastructure.

question: Choose the correct description of the network ACL feature from the following:
options: It can be used by setting only the inbound permission setting.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. Network ACLs are stateless, so you need to configure both inbound and outbound. Option 1 is incorrect. Security groups control the traffic on your instances. Option 2 is incorrect. A VPC network ACL provides arbitrary security as a firewall that controls traffic inside and outside the subnet. Option 4 is incorrect. Normally, it is a stateful security group that only needs to set inbound permissions.

question: Select the best database setup for generating reports based on data content, while also performing transaction processing of customer data. ​
options: RDS is used for customer data processing, and reporting processing is executed on the read replica.
RDS is used for customer data processing and execute reporting processing with RedShift.
RedShift is used for customer data processing and reporting processing
Redshift is used for customer data processing and execute reporting processing with QuickSight
answer: RDS is used for customer data processing, and reporting processing is executed on the read replica.
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. You can use RDS to process customer data and perform reporting processing on the read replica. A read replica is an additional instance of read-only RDS. Load distribution can be achieved by using this for read-only processing such as report processing. Option 2 is incorrect. Redshift is for data analysis, not for reporting. It is also not appropriate because it cannot be used for reporting in cooperation with RDS. Options 3 and 4 are incorrect. Using Redshift for customer data processing is not an optimal database configuration.

question: Company E's system is used globally and is linked with an SQL type RDB. What are the key points check to when migrating to AWS?
options: Select RDS MySQL and perform the migration immediately.
Verify that the RDS restrictions are met.
Apply the latest version of RDS MySQL version.
Install a database engine on your EC2 instance and migrate your RDBS to fully reproduce your on-premises environment
answer: Verify that the RDS restrictions are met.
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. When migrating MySQL to RDS, it is imperative to verify that the RDS restrictions are met. Therefore, it is not correct to perform an immediate migration using RDS MySQL. Perform a gap analysis of the database specifications to determine if the current data processing is applicable and determine the migration method. Option 1 is incorrect. It is not correct to perform an immediate migration using RDS MySQL. Option 3 is incorrect. It is correct to select the most suitable version compared to the SQL business you are currently using. It should not necessarily be the latest version. Option 4 is incorrect. If you install a database engine on your EC2 instance and migrate your RDBS, it should be after RDS has been determined to be incompatible.

question: Select the services available to capture your EC2 instance traffic. ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. You can use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to monitor, store, and access log files for traffic on your Amazon EC2 instances, AWS CloudTrail, Route 53, and other sources. Option 2 is incorrect. CloudWatch Agent is an agent that you install to get the metrics inside your EC2 instance. Not required to get traffic logs. Option 3 is incorrect. CloudWatch Enhanced Monitoring is the ability to get real-time metrics for the operating system (OS) on which your Amazon RDS DB instance is running. Option 4 is incorrect. CloudWatch Events allows you to monitor AWS resource change events.

question: Choose the correct description for one of CloudWatch's features. ​
options: You can manually start monitoring by enabling CloudWatch.
CloudWatch monitoring is not applicable to on-premises environments.
You can set up CloudWatch in your data center.
CloudWatch is all free to use.
answer: You can set up CloudWatch in your data center.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. By using AWS Outposts, you can install and use CloudWatch in your on-premises environment. AWS Outposts is a service that allows you to extend your AWS infrastructure, AWS services, APIs, and tools to almost any data center, colocation space, or on-premises facility. You can use this to build CloudWatch in your data center. Option 1 is incorrect. Depending on the AWS resources to be monitored by CloudWatch, monitoring will start automatically at the same time as using the AWS resources. Option 2 is incorrect. You can configure CloudWatch monitoring to apply to your on-premises environment. Option 4 is incorrect. CloudWatch charges a fee for using extended monitoring and so on.

question: Choose a service that may be cheaper by using AWS Organizations. ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. You can use AWS Organizations to combine multiple accounts to combine volume discounts. The volume discount price range is set for S3 so that the unit price will be cheaper as the amount of data used increases. Therefore, it may be cheaper to use S3 by consolidating usage of all accounts than by paying with individual AWS accounts. Option 2 is incorrect.  With AWS Organizations, Member account can share Reserved Instances of EC2 Instances with other accounts, but this is not a volume discount. Option 3 is incorrect. CloudWatch has a paid option, but no volume discount. Option 4 is incorrect. ElastiCache does not have a volume discount.

question: You're thinking of purchasing an EC2 instance for an application that will be used for a year. This instance has a constant amount of processing. Select the purchase option you should select in this case. ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. Savings Plans is a pricing model where you get a discounted price by contracting for consistent compute usage (eg, measured at USD / hour) over a period of one or three years. This model has low usage fees for EC2, Lambda, and Fargate. EC2 Instance Savings Plans offer up to 72% savings. Option 2 is incorrect. Reserved Instances can be purchased with a 1-year or 3-year usage period. However, Savings Plans are more appropriate when there is a constant amount of processing. Option 3 is incorrect. Schedule Reserved Instance is a purchase option that subscribes to regular usage such as 24 hours a day, 24 hours a week. Option 4 is incorrect. Spot Instances are not available for applications that will be used for one year.

question: Please select the wrong description of the VPC peering feature. ​
options: Peer connection is possible between VPCs of different AWS accounts.
Peer connections between different VPCs across all regions are possible.
There are no single points of failure or bandwidth bottlenecks
Only certain VPCs need to peer directly with the VPC it wants to connect to
answer: Peer connections between different VPCs across all regions are possible.
explanation: Option 2 is the wrong explanation, so it is correct. By using VPC Peering, it is not possible to make peer connections between different VPCs in all regions. For example, you can't connect to a VPC outside of China to a VPC in a region inside China. Option 1 is the correct explanation. You need to get approval from AWS account you want to connect to, but you can set up peer connections between VPCs between different AWS accounts. Option 3 is the correct explanation. It is managed on the AWS side so that there are no single points of failure or bandwidth bottlenecks. Option 4 is the correct explanation. The VPC must peer directly with the VPC you want to connect to.

question: Choose the correct description for EFS. ​ EFS stores files in a distributed manner in multiple regions. ​ EFS can use the SMB protocol. ​
options: EFS is available for use with multiple EC2 instances.
EFS is compatible with Windows file servers.
answer: EFS is available for use with multiple EC2 instances.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. EFS is a file-type storage that can be used from multiple EC2 instances. Option 1 is incorrect. EFS is not multi-regional, it stores files in multiple AZs in a distributed manner. Option 2 is incorrect. EFS cannot use the SMB protocol. The SMB protocol is available for Amazon FSx for Windows. Option 4 is incorrect. Amazon FSx for Windows is compatible with Windows file servers.

question: Select a service that can execute NodeJs program code without using a server. ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. With AWS Lambda, you can run your code without provisioning or managing servers. Lambda can execute NodeJs program code. Option 2 is incorrect. EC2 is a service that makes up a virtual server. Option 3 is incorrect. Lightsail is a virtual private server that is ideal for small-scale web applications. Option 4 is incorrect. ECS uses a server-type launch type, such as EC2, to run your application.

question: Which security measures are the user's responsibility?
options: Addressing vulnerabilities in physical servers that launch EC2 instances
Protecting the data used by your EC2 instance
answer: Protecting the data used by your EC2 instance
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. When you use an EC2 instance as a server, the data you use there is stored in EBS or the instance store. Users are then required to take action, such as enabling EBS data protection. Option 1 is incorrect. Vulnerability countermeasures for physical servers on which EC2 instances are running are within the scope of AWS infrastructure operation management. Option 2 is incorrect. Hypervisor updates are the management of AWS virtualized environments and are handled by AWS. Option 4 is incorrect. Since the protection of network equipment is the protection of the infrastructure environment, AWS will handle it.

question: Choose the correct Kinesis description from the following:
options: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams processes data in parallel by cluster processing.
Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose can collect stream data
Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics can analyze stream data in real time.
Kinesis Agent can store Kinesis data.
answer: Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics can analyze stream data in real time.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics performs real-time analysis of streaming data. Users can use it to build Apache Flink apps, streaming Java apps, and real-time SQL queries. Option 1 is incorrect. Amazon Kinesis Data Streams can process data in parallel with shards. Option 2 is incorrect. Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose is a delivery process that captures, transforms, and loads data streams into AWS datastores. Option 4 is incorrect. The Amazon Kinesis Agent is a tool that supports data collection by installing it in a standalone Java software application. The agent sends data to Kinesis Data Firehose, but it cannot accumulate data.

question: Reserved Instances purchased for 3 years are no longer needed after 1 year. This Reserved Instance is a convertible type. What should we do?
options: Sell this instance on the AWS Marketplace.
Sell this instance on the Amazon Marketplace.
It is necessary to use it until 3 years have passed.
Change this instance to standard type.
answer: It is necessary to use it until 3 years have passed.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. The Convertible Type of Reserved Instances cannot be sold or converted to Standard. Instances available for sale on AWS Marketplace are standard types. Option 1 is incorrect. Only Reserved Instance Standard types are available for re-sale on AWS Marketplace. Option 2 is incorrect. Amazon Marketplace is Amazon's e-commerce site. Option 4 is incorrect. It is not possible to change from a convertible type to a standard.

question: Choose the services available during the planning phase of your migration to AWS. (Please select two.) ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. AWS Application Discovery Service automatically creates a profile for your application in your on-premises environment and then retrieves the data you need. This service can be used to develop a quick and reliable migration plan for your application to AWS. Option 2 is the correct answer. You can use the TCO calculator to calculate the cost forecast when using the AWS cloud. You can use this to analyze and evaluate the cost-effectiveness of using AWS at the planning stage. Option 3 is incorrect. The simple monthly calculation tool is used to calculate the usage fee of individual AWS resources. It is not a tool used during the migration planning stage. Option 4 is incorrect. AWS DMS is a tool used for database migration. It is not a tool used during the migration planning stage. Option 5 is incorrect. AWS SMS is a tool used for server migration. It is not a tool used during the migration planning stage.

question: Select the services you should use to migrate your MySQL database in your on-premises environment to Amazon RDS. ​ Amazon SMS ​
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. You can use the AWS Database Migration Service to quickly and securely migrate your database to AWS. It can be used when migrating databases in an on-premises environment to Amazon RDS, Amazon Aurora, Amazon Redshift, Amazon DynamoDB, or Amazon DocumentDB. Option 1 is incorrect. Amazon SNS is a fully managed messaging service. Not used for database migration. Option 3 is incorrect. AMS is an abbreviation for Amazon Marketing Services, a service within the Amazon EC site. Option 4 is incorrect. Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager manage the lifecycle of your AWS resources.  Not used for database migration.

question: Which service provides reports for use in contract management?
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. AWS Artifact can review, approve, and manage contracts with AWS. AWS Artifact can be applied to contracts with AWS for all current and future accounts in your organization. Option 1 is incorrect. Amazon GuardDuty continuously monitors your AWS accounts and workloads to protect them from malicious and malicious activity. It is not a service that provides contract management or reports. Option 2 is incorrect. AWS IAM Access Analyzer identifies Amazon S3 buckets and IAM roles that are shared with external entities and performs access analysis on them. It is not a service that provides contract management or reports. Option 3 is incorrect. CloudTrail keeps track of your AWS account activity event history. It is not a service that provides contract management or reports.

question: Which support plan will analyze and evaluate the compatibility of your AWS resources with the Well Architected Framework?
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. AWS Support Enterprise Plan users can receive an application evaluation based on the Well Architected Framework for the AWS resources they use and the applications they build. Options 1, 2 and 3 are incorrect. For support plans other than the enterprise plan, you cannot receive an architect evaluation based on the Well Architected Framework from AWS experts.

question: Select a service that cannot work with AWS Lake Formation. ​ Amazon Athena ​
explanation: Lake Formation is a service for easily realizing a data lake configuration using services such as S3. Lake Formation facilitates data movement and analysis to S3 by collecting and cataloging data from databases and object storage. Use machine learning algorithms to clean up and classify your data to protect access to sensitive data. After completing these tasks, users will have access to a centralized data catalog. This data catalog shows the available datasets and their proper usage. Users can use this catalog to configure data lake data usage in conjunction with analytics and machine learning services such as Amazon Redshift for Apache Spark, Amazon Athena, and (Beta) Amazon EMR. Therefore, Lake Formation is not directly linked with Kinesis, so Option 3 is the correct answer.

question: Select an AWS support plan that offers concierge services. ​ Basic ​ Developer ​ Business ​
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. Concierge Support is a support service that addresses all billing and account level questions, except technical support. Concierge support will be available to AWS Support enterprise plan users. Options 1, 2 and 3 are incorrect. Concierge support is not available for Basic, Developer and Business plans.

question: Choose the correct description of the features of ElastiCache for Memcached. ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. Amazon ElastiCache Memcached is an in-memory key-value store service compatible with Memcached. Compared to Amazon ElastiCache Redis, Memcached can handle tasks with a simple configuration. Options 2, 3 and 4 are incorrect. All of these features are Redis features.

question: Which service reports security and compliance improvements to your application?
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that can improve the security and compliance of your applications deployed on AWS. Amazon Inspector can automatically evaluate your application for exposures, vulnerabilities, and deviations from best practices. Option 2 is incorrect. AWS Shield is a managed Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) protection service that safeguards applications running on AWS. AWS Shield provides always-on detection and automatic inline mitigations that minimize application downtime and latency, so there is no need to engage AWS Support to benefit from DDoS protection. Option 3 is incorrect. AWS Artifact is your go-to, central resource for compliance-related information that matters to you. It provides on-demand access to AWS’ security and compliance reports and select online agreements. Option 4 is incorrect. AWS X-Ray helps developers analyze and debug production, distributed applications, such as those built using a microservices architecture.

question: Where is the AWS location where the EC2 instance is located?
explanation: An EC2 instance is a service that you place in a specific Availability Zone within a region. Therefore, option 2 is the correct answer.

question: Choose the correct description of the AWS Personal Health Dashboard feature. (Please select two.) ​
options: It has a personalized display available.
It is used for troubleshooting applications.
It displays areas for cost optimization.
It lists service information about abnormal/ healthy statuses.
answer: It lists service information about abnormal/ healthy statuses.
explanation: Personal Health Dashboard gives you a personalized view of the status of AWS services running your applications so you can instantly see issues in progress. For example, if an EBS volume associated with one of your EC2 instances is lost, you can quickly see the status of the associated service and help identify the root cause. Therefore, option 1 is the correct answer. AWS Personal Health Dashboard provides information about health events that can be seen as abnormal and healthy for AWS resources that can affect your account. Therefore, option 5 is the correct answer.

question: Select a feature provided by AWS Trusted Adviser. ​
options: It provides a guide for cost optimization.
It can carry out cost monitoring
It can detect the occurrence of a failure
answer: It provides a guide for cost optimization.
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. Like a cloud expert, Trusted Advisor analyzes your AWS resources and built applications and suggests recommended actions based on five categories. ・ Cost optimization・ performance ・ Security・ Fault tolerance・ Service restrictions

question: Select the tool you would use to quote the usage charges for individual services. ​ AWS Simple Monthly Calculator ​
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. The AWS Pricing Calculator can provide cost estimates that meet the individual needs of AWS products and services. With this tool, you can identify services such as EC2 and S3 and make an estimate based on their usage time and number of requests. Option 1 is incorrect. The AWS Simple Monthly Calculator also allows you to quote according to your service. However, this tool will no longer be available and will simply use the AWS Pricing Calculator in the future. Option 3 is incorrect. You can use the TCO calculator to calculate the total cost of using AWS and compare it with your on-premises environment or other AWS services. It is not used to estimate individual resources. Option 4 is incorrect. AWS Cost Explorer can visualize and analyze the usage status of AWS resources using graphs. It is not used to estimate individual resources.

question: Which services provide real-time monitoring for compliance and vulnerabilities? (Please select three.) ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. AWS Config is one of the services that provides real-time monitoring of compliance. You can use the AWS Config console, AWS CLI, or AWS Config API to view the compliance state of your rules and resources. Option 3 is the correct answer. AWS Trusted Advisor is one of the services that provides real-time monitoring of compliance and vulnerabilities. AWS Trusted Advisor can identify issues such as AWS resource state vulnerabilities based on five categories: cost optimization, security, resiliency, performance, and service limits. The checked status is displayed in different colors on the dashboard page. Option 4 is the correct answer. Amazon Inspector is one of the services that provides real-time monitoring of compliance and vulnerabilities. Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that can improve the security and compliance of your applications deployed on AWS. Option 2 is wrong. CloudWatch is a common system monitoring service. Option 5 is wrong. CloudTrail is a service for acquiring user access logs.

question: Choose the factors that affect the cost of your S3 storage. (Please select three.) ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. Basically, S3 is charged based on the the amount of stored data. Option 3 is the correct answer. S3 will also be charged according to the number of requests when acquiring data. Option 5 is the correct answer. There are some differences in pricing for S3 depending on the region where it is installed. Therefore, the price also depends on the region. Options 2 and 4 are incorrect. S3 is not charged according to data type or transfer rate.

question: What research methods should I carry out if I want to reduce AWS costs? (Please select three.) ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. A tag is a label that a user or AWS assigns to an AWS resource. Each tag consists of a key and a value. Users can use cost allocation tags to track AWS costs at a level of detail. When you activate a cost allocation tag, AWS uses the cost allocation tag to organize resource costs in your cost allocation reports, making it easier to classify and track AWS costs. Option 3 is the correct answer. Enabling billing alerts using CloudWatch makes it easier to track and manage your spending. Billing alerts trigger an alarm when your AWS account bills exceed the threshold. Option 4 is the correct answer. Cost Explorer is a tool you can use to view and analyze costs and usage. Graphs and analytic reports show data for the last 13 months and give you an idea of ​​how likely you are to spend in the next three months. Option 2 is incorrect. There is no service called AWS Price List. Option 5 is incorrect. AWS Pricing Calculator is an individual AWS resource estimation tool. Not available for cost investigation.

question: A company bought six Reserved EC2 instances on a three-year contract to apply the discount rate, but a sudden change in demand led to the sale of two instances on the Marketplace 10 months later. Please select the purchased type and sales method. (Please select two.) ​
options: You can set a prepaid price when selling an instance.
You cannot set a prepaid price when selling an instance.
You can change the usage fee and configuration of the instance.
answer: You can set a prepaid price when selling an instance.
explanation: Reserved Instance Standards are available for sale in the Marketplace. Only Amazon EC2 Standard Reserved Instances can be sold on the Reserved Instance Marketplace. Convertible Reserved Instances are not available for sale. The Standard Reserved Instance must be valid for at least one month. Therefore, option 1 is the correct answer. When you sell an Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance on the Marketplace, you can only set the option of a prepaid price for your instance. Therefore, option 3 is the correct answer. Option 2 is incorrect. Reserved Instance Convertibles are not available for sale on the AWS Marketplace. Option 4 is incorrect. When you sell an Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance on the Marketplace, you can only set the option to set a prepaid price for your instance. Option 5 is incorrect. The usage fee and other configurations cannot be changed freely at the time of sale.

question: Which EBS volume type should you set when using infrequently accessed data on an EC2 instance?
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. A low-cost volume designed for infrequently accessed workloads is a cold HDD. Option 1 is incorrect. A general purpose SSD is a price- and performance-balanced volume that can accommodate a wide range of transactional workloads. Option 2 is incorrect. Throughput-optimized HDDs are volumes for frequently accessed workloads that require high throughput. It can be used at a lower cost than Provisioned IOPS. Option 4 is incorrect. Magnetic is an old volume of the old generation.

question: Where is AWS Shield located, so as to protect AWS resources from DDos attacks?
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. AWS Shield is used in all of Amazon CloudFront, AWS Global Accelerator, and Amazon Route 53 edge locations around the world. For example, when you apply CloudFront, AWS Shield is automatically applied to prevent DDos attacks at the edge location.

question: Choose the correct description for the characteristics of your private subnet. ​ Instances in the private subnet are also inaccessible from resources in the public subnet. ​
options: By using a NAT gateway, resources in the private subnet can be accessed from the Internet.
By using a NAT gateway, it is possible to reply to the Internet from a private subnet.
Instances in the private subnet can be accessed from client PCs by using SSH.
answer: By using a NAT gateway, it is possible to reply to the Internet from a private subnet.
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. By routing the private subnet to the NAT gateway, it is possible to reply to the Internet while preventing access from the Internet. Option 1 is incorrect. Instances in the private subnet can be accessed by resources in the public subnet. Option 2 is incorrect. Even if a NAT gateway is installed, direct access from the Internet is not possible. Option 4 is incorrect. Access from the client PC using SSH to the instance in the private subnet is not possible directly because access from the Internet is blocked.

question: Which cloud type allows users to purchase services that have already been completed in a subscription format?
explanation: Option 3 is the correct answer. Software as a Service (SaaS) is cloud-based software that allows you to use as many services as you need. It may also indicate software that is available over the Internet. Option 1 is incorrect. Platform as a service allows users to focus on deploying and managing applications without the need of management of the infrastructure, typically hardware and operating systems. This makes it more efficient because you don't have to worry about resource procurement, capacity planning, software maintenance, patching, or other undifferentiated heavy tasks related to running applications. Option 2 is incorrect. Infrastructure as a service (IaaS) is an infrastructure such as a server that is provisioned over the Internet and provided as a service. The user is responsible for OS selection and middleware management. Option 4 is incorrect. Desktop as a Service (DaaS) is a virtual desktop service. It provides PC settings and functions to the desktop via the Internet.

question: Select a tool that allows you to directly perform operations such as creating and deleting AWS services. (Please select two.) ​
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. The AWS Management Console is a web-based operations console. You can access AWS and manage your AWS resources from a simple, intuitive web-based user interface. Option 2 is the correct answer. The AWS CLI is a service used to manage multiple AWS services using scripts. You can control multiple AWS services from the command line and use scripts to configure and manage them. Option 3 is incorrect. AWS Systems Manager is an AWS operations management service that makes it easy to configure and manage VMs, Amazon EC2 instances, on-premises servers, and virtual machines (VMs) in other cloud environments. Option 4 is incorrect. IAM is a user management service used to manage access to AWS resources. Option 5 is incorrect. The command prompt is used as the installation destination when using the AWS CLI, but it cannot be used for AWS operations by itself.

question: Which principles should you adhere to when granting access to users through IAM policies?
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. When you set up an IAM policy for a resource or user, you grant only the permissions needed to perform the task according to the principle of least privilege. Define the required tasks for users (and roles) and create a policy that allows only those tasks. As such, it is important to start with the minimum permissions and grant additional permissions as needed.

question: Select a service that is not available at Edge Location among the following:
explanation: Option 2 is the correct answer. Edge Location is set up as a data center for content distribution and constitutes a global network for CDNs. Delivery services such as CloudFront, Route53, and Lambda Edge are available at this location.

question: Please select the wrong description as an item that affects your pricing when using an On-Demand EC2 instance. ​
options: Amount of data in the attached volume
Data transfer within the same region
answer: Data transfer within the same region
explanation: Option 4 is the wrong explanation and is the correct answer. You will not be charged for data transfers within the same region. Option 1 is the correct explanation. On-demand instances are billed based on usage time in seconds or hours. Option 2 is the correct explanation. You will be charged according to the amount of data on the EBS volume attached to your EC2 instance. Option 3 is the correct explanation. You will be charged for transferring data to other regions.

question: Please select the tool to use to check the usage fee by service from the beginning of that month to the current day. ​
options: Billing and Cost Management Console Billing
answer: Billing and Cost Management Console Billing
explanation: Option 4 is the correct answer. It is a recommended feature to check the Billing and Cost Management console dashboard on a regular basis. The dashboard allows you to visually see various detailed data on AWS usage in a graph. You can see the graph below. ・ Overview of usage fees・ Usage fee by service from the beginning of this month to today・ The most expensive service from the beginning of this month to today Option 1 is incorrect. AWS Cost Explorer is a tool that performs cost analysis and generates reports. You can calculate the expected billing amount at the end of the next month. Option 2 is incorrect. The billing alarm notification only tells you that your billing amount has exceeded the threshold. Option 3 is incorrect. The cost allocation report reports detailed cost allocation. The following items are included. This will be used to see more detailed cost allocations than service charges from the beginning of this month to today. ・Account ID ・Invoices and billing information ・Usage amount and unit ・Rate and cost ・Product attributes (instance type, operating system, region, etc.) ・Price attributes (offer type, lease period, etc.) ・Reserved ID and associated details (Reserved Instances only)

question: Choose the benefits of AWS when using it for applications with high demand fluctuations. ​
options: Increase or decrease EC2 instances on demand
ELB traffic control is provided as a managed service
Multi-AZ configuration of applications is possible
answer: Increase or decrease EC2 instances on demand
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. The cloud can increase the efficiency of infrastructure costs for highly volatile applications. For example, Auto Scaling for EC2 instances allows on-demand instances to be launched / terminated on demand. With this mechanism, you can optimize the usage fee of your EC2 instance. Option 2 is incorrect. The managed traffic control provided by ELB does not affect prices due to fluctuations in demand. Option 3 is incorrect. The multi-AZ configuration acts not as an effect on demand fluctuations, but as ensuring availability in the event of a failure. Option 4 is incorrect. Free CloudWatch monitoring helps reduce monitoring costs, but it does not provide a price advantage over fluctuations in demand.

question: Please select the action to be taken when you want to reproduce the configuration of the EC2 instance in another region. ​
options: Copy the AMI of the target EC2 instance to another region.
Copy the snapshot of the target EC2 instance to another region.
Migrate the target EC2 instance to another region.
answer: Copy the AMI of the target EC2 instance to another region.
explanation: Option 1 is the correct answer. If you want to reproduce the configuration of the EC2 instance in another region, get the AMI of the target instance and copy it to another region. Then, you can build an EC2 instance with the same configuration by selecting that AMI in another region and launching a new EC2 instance. Options 2 and 4 are incorrect. EC2 instances need to be copied using the AMI. Snapshots are used when copying EBS. Option 3 is incorrect. The target instance itself cannot be migrated to another region.

question: Select settings that you don't need to configure your S3 static website. ​
explanation: Option 4 is not required and is the correct answer. In order to use S3 static web hosting, you need to use bucket policy instead of setting access control policy and grant s3: GetObject permission to all users. Option 1 is the correct setting. In order to use S3 static web hosting, you need to enable static website hosting, set index documents, and set permissions. Option 2 is the correct setting. It is necessary to disable public access blocks in order for static websites to be viewable. Option 3 is the correct setting. To make your HTML file publicly readable, you need to create a bucket policy that grants s3: GetObject permissions to all users.

question: Select the wrong description for the characteristics of a subnet . ​ Subnets can configure private networks. ​ Network ACLs are applied to subnets. ​ Set a route table for the subnet. ​
options: One subnet can be installed in multiple AZs.
answer: One subnet can be installed in multiple AZs.
